heading: About GoldAlp
intro: GoldAlp is an independent comparator for physical gold and silver, built for buyers who want clarity on price, provenance, and cross-border rules before they transact.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.text: Gold markets are opaque by design. Dealer premiums vary widely and the legal obligations around buying, importing, and reselling differ from one jurisdiction to the next. We bring these together in one place, in plain language, so you can compare on equal terms.

editorial.title: Editorial independence
editorial.text: We are not a dealer, bank, or advisor. Our comparisons and regulatory summaries are researched independently and updated as legislation changes, with sources cited throughout.

coverage.title: Coverage
coverage.text: We currently track Switzerland, France, Germany, Italy, and the United States, with content available in French, German, Italian, and English.

team.title: Our team
team.text: GoldAlp is built by a small team based in Switzerland. Full profiles are coming soon.

disclaimer: GoldAlp provides comparative and informational content only. It is not a substitute for advice from a licensed financial, tax, or legal professional.
